description_long: This is a single bed with a sturdy wooden frame, featuring a prominent headboard and footboard at either end. The bed is topped with a thick, rectangular mattress covered by a vibrant, rainbow-gradient comforter that transitions smoothly from red at the head to blue at the foot. Two white pillows are neatly placed at the head of the bed, adding a touch of comfort and symmetry. The wooden frame has a smooth, polished finish, with rounded posts at the corners for added stability and visual appeal. The overall design is simple yet functional, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings. The bed's colorful bedding makes it visually striking and easily recognizable in any environment.
description: A wooden single bed with a rainbow-gradient comforter, white pillows, and both a headboard and footboard. The frame is smooth and polished, with a vibrant, eye-catching bedding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the rainbow comforter, and both pillows at the head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the footboard, the width of the bed, and the colorful bedding leading up to the headboard and pillows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bed's length, the gradient comforter, and the pillows at the headboard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the headboard, with the pillows and the start of the rainbow bedding visible.
